prompt: Generate and visualize the depth map of the image, representing closer objects with lighter shades of gray and distant objects with darker shades.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, a grayscale illustration of a rooster against a dark background, to generate and visualize its depth map. The resulting depth map should represent closer objects with lighter shades of gray, and more distant objects, such as the dark background and subtle foliage, with darker shades. The rooster, being the primary subject, should be prominently lighter than its surroundings.
objects: Rooster represented by lighter shades of gray
Rooster's prominent tail feathers represented by lighter shades of gray
Rooster's body feathers represented by lighter shades of gray
Rooster's head and comb represented by lighter shades of gray
Rooster's legs and feet represented by lighter shades of gray
Foreground ground/surface represented by shades of gray indicating its depth
Subtle foliage represented by darker shades of gray
Dark background represented by the darkest shades of gray
